/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/prach_detector_benchmark.dir/prach_detector_benchmark.cpp.o -o prach_detector_benchmark  ../../../../../lib/phy/support/libocudu_phy_support.a ../../../../../lib/phy/upper/channel_processors/prach/libocudu_prach_detector.a ../../../../../lib/phy/generic_functions/libocudu_dft.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../lib/instrumentation/libocudu_instrumentation.a ../../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../../lib/ran/libocudu_ran.a ../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3f.so
